targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) AS cnt FROM events e WHERE $__timeFilter(e.ts) AND (NULLIF('${src_ip}', '') IS NULL OR host(e.src_ip) = NULLIF('${src_ip}', '')) AND (NULLIF('${agent_id}', '') IS NULL OR e.agent_id = NULLIF('${agent_id}', '')) AND (NULLIF('${channel}', '') IS NULL OR '${channel}' = 'All' OR e.channel = '${channel}') AND (NULLIF('${severity}', '') IS NULL OR e.wazuh_rule_level >= NULLIF('${severity}', '')::int)
SELECT count(*) FROM investigations i WHERE (NULLIF('${investigation_id}', '') IS NULL OR i.id::text = NULLIF('${investigation_id}', ''))

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(e.ts, $__interval), count(*) AS events FROM events e WHERE $__timeFilter(e.ts) AND (NULLIF('${src_ip}', '') IS NULL OR host(e.src_ip) = NULLIF('${src_ip}', '')) AND (NULLIF('${agent_id}', '') IS NULL OR e.agent_id = NULLIF('${agent_id}', '')) AND (NULLIF('${channel}', '') IS NULL OR '${channel}' = 'All' OR e.channel = '${channel}') AND (NULLIF('${severity}', '') IS NULL OR e.wazuh_rule_level >= NULLIF('${severity}', '')::int) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Event timeline (brush time range with dashboard picker)

targets.rawSql: SELECT e.ts, host(e.src_ip) AS src_ip, e.channel, e.wazuh_rule_level, e.wazuh_rule_description, e.agent_name, left(e.raw_ref, 200) AS raw_ref_preview FROM events e WHERE $__timeFilter(e.ts) AND (NULLIF('${src_ip}', '') IS NULL OR host(e.src_ip) = NULLIF('${src_ip}', '')) AND (NULLIF('${agent_id}', '') IS NULL OR e.agent_id = NULLIF('${agent_id}', '')) AND (NULLIF('${channel}', '') IS NULL OR '${channel}' = 'All' OR e.channel = '${channel}') AND (NULLIF('${severity}', '') IS NULL OR e.wazuh_rule_level >= NULLIF('${severity}', '')::int) ORDER BY e.ts DESC LIMIT 200

SELECT t.ts_event, t.phase, t.description, t.source FROM timeline_events t WHERE (NULLIF('${investigation_id}', '') IS NULL OR t.investigation_id::text = NULLIF('${investigation_id}', '')) ORDER BY t.ts_event ASC LIMIT 100

SELECT f.evidence_id, f.severity, f.verdict, f.mitre_technique, f.finding, f.citation FROM findings f WHERE (NULLIF('${investigation_id}', '') IS NULL OR f.investigation_id::text = NULLIF('${investigation_id}', '')) ORDER BY f.ts ASC LIMIT 50

SELECT i.id, i.subject, i.status, i.verdict, i.confidence, i.kill_chain_summary, i.started_at, i.closed_at FROM investigations i WHERE (NULLIF('${investigation_id}', '') IS NULL OR i.id::text = NULLIF('${investigation_id}', '')) ORDER BY i.started_at DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT ioc.type, ioc.value, ioc.defanged, ioc.source, ioc.created_at FROM iocs ioc WHERE (NULLIF('${investigation_id}', '') IS NULL OR ioc.investigation_id::text = NULLIF('${investigation_id}', '')) ORDER BY ioc.created_at ASC LIMIT 50

SELECT a.ts, a.tool_name, left(a.result_summary, 120) AS result_summary, a.duration_ms FROM agent_actions a WHERE (NULLIF('${investigation_id}', '') IS NULL OR a.investigation_id::text = NULLIF('${investigation_id}', '')) ORDER BY a.ts DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT host(b.ip) AS ip, b.reason, b.executed, b.added_at, b.executed_at, b.notes FROM blocklist b ORDER BY b.added_at DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT w.event_id, w.watched_at, w.investigation_id FROM watched_events w ORDER BY w.watched_at DESC LIMIT 50

list.definition: SELECT 'All' AS channel UNION SELECT DISTINCT channel FROM events WHERE channel IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1
list.label: Channel
list.name: channel
list.query: SELECT 'All' AS channel UNION SELECT DISTINCT channel FROM events WHERE channel IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT agent_id FROM events WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1
list.label: Agent ID
list.name: agent_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT agent_id FROM events WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1
